name: Sm Parmesan Break-Away Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat sandwich maker.
2. Cut each of the 10 biscuits into 4 pieces.
3. Combine melted butter and garlic salt in one small dish.
4. Measure cheese into a second dish.
5. Dip each piece into melted butter, then roll in Parmesan cheese.
6. Set aside until all are ready.
7. Place 5 tiny pieces in each of the eight pockets.
8. Close lid and bake for 5 minutes or until biscuits are golden brown.
